name: IPC-Round-Trip-Latency (IRTL)
description: Measures the time elapsed for a 'Message-Packet' to travel from a 'Requester-Agent' to a 'Provider-Agent' and back with a 'Status-Acknowledgment'.
goalMapping: Optimizes 'Real-Time-Orchestration' and prevents 'Logic-Stalling' in high-frequency execution environments.
